cases.scenario: Patched only a temporary miner copy to read a mktemp session root and ran --since 2026-06-01 --json.
cases.expected: Exit 0 with parseable JSON and no NaN.

cases.scenario: Session filename implies 2026-05-20; assistant is 2026-06-02 and compaction is 2026-06-03.
cases.expected: Both events survive --since and bucket to week 2026-06-01.

cases.scenario: Error predecessor says 'exceeds the available context size'.
cases.expected: Reactive with 400000 window and no unknown model.

cases.scenario: Error predecessor says 'Error Code invalid_prompt: Request blocked.'.
cases.expected: Proactive; invalid_prompt alone is not an overflow signal.
cases.actual: classification=proactive; snippets=['Error Code invalid_prompt: Request blocked.'].

cases.scenario: Aborted predecessor says '400 Your input exceeds the context window of this model'.
cases.actual: classification=reactive; snippets=['400 Your input exceeds the context window of this model'].

cases.expected: Windows resolve to 400000 and 262144, neither appears in unknownModels.

cases.scenario: 400k model compacts at 300000 tokens on 2026-06-20 and 2026-06-25.
cases.expected: Pre-cutover threshold is 272000 expected; post-cutover threshold is 340000 premature.
linesRejected=1 and process does not crash.
unknownModels records it and evidence is unknown-window.

cases.scenario: Run the frozen miner against the real store with --since 2026-06-01 --json.
cases.expected: Exit 0, valid JSON, and weekly reactive + proactive equals compactions for every week.

commands: python3 QA harness: mktemp -d; copied scripts/mine-compaction-history.ts; patched SESSIONS_ROOT only in the temporary copy; wrote a temporary fixture JSONL; ran bun <temporary>/mine.ts --since 2026-06-01 --json; asserted all fixture cases.
bun scripts/mine-compaction-history.ts --since 2026-06-01 --json (real store; parsed JSON; asserted reactive + proactive == compactions for every weekly aggregate).
Frozen scripts/mine-compaction-history.ts and artifacts/compaction-mining-v2.json were not edited. No formatters or project gates were run.
